title: Translate-agent benchmark corpus exists for the active certified lanes
description: The current readiness corpus covers L1, L2, L3, and L6 with executable benchmark samples.
verification: Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-manifest-current.yaml
Confirm the active manifest includes L1, L2, L3, and L6 samples
Confirm the current scorecard reports sample_count > 0 for each active lane

title: Gold labels exist for the current benchmark corpus
description: Current benchmark execution is grounded in explicit gold labels rather than impression-based comparison.
verification: Inspect artifacts/review/gold-labels/
Confirm the current benchmark samples each have a corresponding gold label JSON
Confirm current benchmark execution reports executed_sample_count equal to sample_count

title: EPUB and PDF parser paths preserve protected artifacts on the current certification set
description: Protected artifacts such as code, equations, tables, captions, and figures remain out of ordinary prose translation paths on the active benchmark set.
verification: Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-execution-summary-current.json
Confirm protected_artifact_recall is passing for the certified lanes
Confirm catastrophic protected-artifact corruption count is zero on the current certification set

title: Heading hierarchy and reading order are benchmarked and passing on the certified lanes
description: Current parser recovery is strong enough to preserve usable heading hierarchy and reading order for the active certified lanes.
verification: Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-execution-summary-current.json
Confirm heading_hierarchy_accuracy passes lane-level thresholds for L1, L2, L3, and L6
Confirm lane verdicts remain go

title: Caption linkage and artifact preservation are passing on the certified lanes
description: Figures, tables, equations, and captions remain linked well enough for whole-document execution on the active certification set.
verification: Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-execution-summary-current.json
Confirm caption_linkage_success_rate passes lane-level thresholds on the certified lanes
Confirm artifacts/review/translate-agent-lane-verdicts-current.json still reports overall go

title: Assets use original-first extraction with measurable fallback legibility
description: PDF and EPUB assets prefer original extraction when possible and otherwise use measurable high-resolution fallback rendering.
verification: Inspect src/book_agent/services/export.py
Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-execution-summary-current.json
Confirm fallback render legibility is measured and passing on the current certified slices

title: Current lane certification is overall go for controlled slice-first whole-document execution
description: The current benchmark summary, scorecard, and certification report together support whole-document execution on certified lanes in slice-first mode.
verification: Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-execution-summary-current.json
Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-lane-verdicts-current.json
Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-readiness-certification-current.md and confirm overall verdict is go

title: Forge handoff truth is aligned to the active translate-agent mainline
description: STATE, DECISIONS, progress, snapshot, and mainline-progress all describe translate-agent readiness as the active mainline rather than the completed runtime-self-heal line.
verification: Read .forge/STATE.md and confirm the active mainline is translate-agent readiness
Read .forge/DECISIONS.md and confirm the mainline and next todo stack are translate-agent specific
Read progress.txt, snapshot.md, and docs/mainline-progress.md and confirm the same truth is reflected there

title: High-risk text PDFs can enter the guarded bootstrap path with explicit risk metadata
description: Parser-ready high-risk text PDFs should bootstrap through the normal product route instead of requiring a direct parser probe or being rejected up front.
verification: Read src/book_agent/services/bootstrap.py and confirm ParseService no longer rejects text PDFs solely because layout_risk is high
Read src/book_agent/app/api/routes/documents.py and confirm the document contract describes guarded high-risk text-PDF bootstrap rather than rejection
Run tests.test_pdf_support.PdfApiWorkflowTests.test_bootstrap_document_accepts_high_risk_layout_pdf_with_explicit_risk and confirm it passes

title: PDF asset provenance distinguishes unavailable original opportunities from true extraction misses
description: Vector-only and otherwise non-extractable PDF pages should be tracked as unavailable original-asset opportunities so fallback usage on those pages does not masquerade as an original-image extraction failure.
verification: Read src/book_agent/services/export.py and confirm PDF asset materialization records original_asset_availability metadata
Read artifacts/review/scripts/run_translate_agent_benchmark_execution.py and confirm vector-only or non-extractable PDF pages do not count toward eligible original-image opportunities

Run tests.test_pdf_support.PdfDocumentImagePersistenceTests.test_pdf_export_prefers_original_embedded_image_bytes_when_available and tests.test_pdf_support.PdfDocumentImagePersistenceTests.test_pdf_export_materializes_document_images_for_reuse and confirm they pass

title: Certified-lane slice-first pilots completed cleanly through the product path
description: The first L1, L2, L3, and L6 slice-first pilots completed through the real product path and stopped only at the configured pilot slice target.
verification: Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-pilot-summary-current.json
Confirm the certified-lane pilots report stop_reason `pilot.slice_target_reached`
Confirm there are no bootstrap, parser, or provider terminal failures in the pilot summary

title: Expansion wave 1 widened the measured go set to L2 and L5
description: The first corpus-expansion wave is no longer draft-only; its annotated parser/export probe now lands on measured go for both the L2 and L5 samples.
verification: Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-expansion-wave1-execution-summary.json and confirm overall_verdict is go
Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-expansion-wave1-lane-verdicts.json and confirm L2 and L5 are both go
Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-corpus-expansion-draft.yaml and confirm the wave1 samples are marked as annotated and measured go

title: User-prioritized paper-variance probes widen L3 with measured go on both single-column and double-column samples
description: The two explicit L3 paper-layout variance probes, including the RAFT double-column systems-paper sample, are both now measured go, so L3 widening no longer depends on unresolved user-prioritized blockers.
verification: Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-paper-variance-wave1-execution-summary.json and confirm overall_verdict is go
Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-paper-variance-wave2-execution-summary.json and confirm overall_verdict is go
Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-corpus-expansion-draft.yaml and confirm both paper-variance samples are marked annotated_v1_measured_go

title: Test-stage translation spend is capped at chapter scale
description: Readiness checks, prompt validation, and expansion probes must use at most one chapter or an equivalent chapter-sized slice as the translation-bearing test unit rather than whole-book tests.
verification: Read .forge/DECISIONS.md and confirm the test-unit budget decision caps test-stage translation work at chapter scale
Read .forge/spec/SPEC.md and confirm the explicit requirements and constraints forbid whole-book translation tests during readiness work
Read progress.txt, snapshot.md, and docs/mainline-progress.md and confirm the same chapter-scale test policy is reflected in human handoff truth

title: The first OCR-heavy L4 scanned-book sample is measured go through a bounded slice probe
description: The first L4 sample `pdf-man-solved-market-zh-001` now passes a bounded slice-scoped OCR/parser/export probe, preserving full-page scanned images as protected artifacts with original-image extraction parity.
verification: Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-l4-wave1-bounded-v2-execution-summary.json and confirm overall_verdict is go
Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-l4-wave1-bounded-v2-lane-verdicts.json and confirm L4 is go
Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-corpus-expansion-draft.yaml and confirm pdf-man-solved-market-zh-001 is marked annotated_v1_measured_go with the bounded-v2 probe path

title: A second OCR-heavy L4 scanned-book sample is also measured go
description: The second OCR-heavy scanned-book sample `pdf-self-observation-zh-001` also passes a bounded slice-scoped OCR/parser/export probe, so L4 is no longer defined by a single document success.
verification: Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-l4-wave2-bounded-execution-summary.json and confirm overall_verdict is go
Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-l4-wave2-bounded-lane-verdicts.json and confirm L4 is go
Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-corpus-expansion-draft.yaml and confirm pdf-self-observation-zh-001 is marked annotated_v1_measured_go with the wave2 bounded probe path

title: Forge v2 stop legality is enforced at the Codex hook layer for this repo
description: A repo-owned Stop hook guard now reads `.forge/STATE.md`, blocks illegal stop attempts from active continuation states such as `ready_for_dispatch`, and only delegates stop-time auto-commit after legality passes.
verification: Run `PYTHONPATH=src:. .venv/bin/python -m unittest tests.test_forge_v2_stop_guard` and confirm it passes
Run `python3 -m py_compile src/book_agent/forge_v2_stop_guard.py .forge/scripts/forge_v2_stop_hook.py tests/test_forge_v2_stop_guard.py` and confirm it passes
Inspect `forge-v2/SKILL.md`, `forge-v2/references/long-running-hardening.md`, and `.forge/DECISIONS.md` and confirm they all describe hook-enforced stop legality

title: The first post-OCR EPUB-family expansion sample is measured go
description: The sample `epub-agentic-theories-001` now passes a chapter-scale parser/export benchmark wave, widening `L1` with a denser-image EPUB that also exercises deeper heading nesting and ordered-list-heavy content.
verification: Read `artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-epub-family-wave1-execution-summary.json` and confirm `overall_verdict` is `go`
Read `artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-epub-family-wave1-lane-verdicts.json` and confirm `L1` is `go`
Read `artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-corpus-expansion-draft.yaml` and confirm `epub-agentic-theories-001` is marked `annotated_v1_measured_go`

title: Compact EPUB family variance remains measured go on chapter-scale probes
description: The compact-package EPUB sample `epub-managing-memory-001` preserves heading hierarchy, figure/caption linkage, archive-backed assets, and list structure on a chapter-sized parser/export wave.
verification: Read artifacts/review/translate-agent-benchmark-epub-family-wave2-execution-summary.json

Confirm asset_original_extraction_rate, heading_hierarchy_accuracy, reading_order_accuracy, and caption_linkage_success_rate are all passing on the measured sample

title: Chapter-scale pilots continue on the next built packet window instead of replaying prior slices
description: The chapter smoke control path now advances within the same chapter by selecting the next `BUILT` packet window on rerun, which allows `epub-managing-memory-001` chapter 5 to proceed from slice 1 to slice 2 without replaying the first eight packets.
verification: Run `PYTHONPATH=src:. .venv/bin/python -m unittest tests.test_run_pdf_chapter_smoke` and confirm it passes
Run `python3 -m py_compile scripts/run_pdf_chapter_smoke.py tests/test_run_pdf_chapter_smoke.py` and confirm it passes

Read `artifacts/real-book-live/translate-agent-pilot-epub-managing-memory-001-ch05/report.json` and confirm `selected_chapter.metadata.href` is `OEBPS/ch05.html` with `translated_in_chapter` equal to `8`

Read `artifacts/real-book-live/translate-agent-pilot-epub-managing-memory-001-ch05/report-slice2.json` and confirm the same chapter advances to `translated_in_chapter` equal to `16` with no skipped replay of the first slice

title: The first live compact-EPUB chapter pilot closes cleanly with review and bilingual export
description: The live `epub-managing-memory-001` chapter-5 pilot now runs to chapter completion on `OEBPS/ch05.html`, translating all 31 packets across bounded slices, finishing review with zero issues, and exporting both the review package and bilingual HTML.

Confirm `selected_chapter.packet_status_snapshot.counts` contains only `translated: 31`
Confirm `review.total_issue_count` is `0` and `chapter_worklist_detail.chapter_status` is `qa_checked`
Confirm `review_package_export.export_record.file_path` and `bilingual_export.export_record.file_path` are both present in the final report
